homepage.features.crossPlatform.desc.message: Android, HarmonyOS, iOS, macOS, Apple TV, Windows, and Web — set it up once and enjoy your music everywhere with a consistent experience.

homepage.features.multiSource.desc.message: Connect to multiple NAS music servers at the same time, including Navidrome, Subsonic, and Jellyfin, and manage them in one place.

homepage.features.quality.desc.message: Supports lossless audio decoding with smart caching and offline mode, so your listening quality is never compromised.

homepage.hero.subtitle.message: Musiver is a cross-platform NAS music player that supports multiple server protocols. Enjoy the richness of your personal music library on every device you own.

homepage.quote.message: "Music is the art of time, and Musiver lets that art move beyond space."

download.subtitle.message: Choose your platform and get started with the best NAS music player.

download.meta.desc.message: Download Musiver for Android, HarmonyOS, iOS, macOS, Apple TV, Windows, and Web.

download.meta.noReleaseForPlatform.message: No release available for this platform in the {channel} channel.

download.release.stable.upcoming.message: A brand-new version is coming soon!

download.release.beta.upcoming.light.message: A brand-new version, ready to go light!

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_2.commo.message: Added privacy policy consent dialog for compliance

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_2.apple.message: Enhanced full-screen lyrics presentation in player

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_2.deskt.message: Prevent multiple app instances on desktop (single-instance plugin)

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_2.commo.message: Added folder browsing feature for compatible servers
Enhanced sidebar playlist loading and display
Improved favorite track state synchronization across views

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_2.deskt.message: Improved loop/repeat button active state styling

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_2.commo.message: Added audiobook library support for Emby servers

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_3.commo.message: Refactored server management interface with new server configuration and management features
Playlist now supports pagination loading with infinite scroll
Enhanced playlist functionality with edit and delete support
Lyrics display now supports translated text

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_3.apple.message: Playback controls now use cover-extracted color as accent
Fixed: Player view now auto-hides when keyboard is visible

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_3.andro.message: Simplified MiniPlayerBar by removing playback control buttons
Artist page now supports shuffle playback mode toggle

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_3.deskt.message: New song detail page with comprehensive track information
Fixed: Lyrics blur effect no longer gets clipped
Prevent multiple app instances on desktop (single-instance plugin)
Improved loop/repeat button active state styling

pricing.features.transfer.item8.note.message: Currently has poor compatibility, please assume unavailable

pricing.features.system.item4.note.message: If APP is closed, music stops upon next open

pricing.header.subtitle.message: Basic features are forever free. Unlock advanced features with a one-time lifetime purchase.

pricing.plan.free.desc.message: Provides a complete basic music playback and transfer experience for daily listening.

pricing.plan.pro.desc.message: One-time purchase, lifetime access across all platforms. Supports up to 7 devices simultaneously.

pricing.faq.a1.message: It is a one-time purchase for lifetime access across all platforms. The membership can be used on up to 7 devices simultaneously. If the limit is exceeded, the membership on the earliest logged-in device will be automatically revoked.

pricing.faq.a2.message:
Currently available for purchase on mobile devices only:
• iOS: Purchase via AppStore. Refunds can be requested through AppStore within 3 months (not controlled by the developer).
• Android: Purchase via Alipay. Contact aqzscn@qq.com within 6 months for a refund (Alipay order number required).

It is recommended to bind an email after a successful purchase to restore it on other devices via email verification code (Email binding cannot be changed later, so do not use temporary emails).

pricing.faq.a3.message: Yes, membership verification uses online verification. Verification is triggered randomly upon startup, so please ensure your device can connect to the internet as much as possible.

changelog.meta.desc.message: Musiver release notes and version history.

changelog.subtitle.message: Discover what's new in Musiver. We constantly update the app to bring you the best cross-platform music experience.

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_4.commo.message: Playback queue supports semantic filtering (Recently Played/Most Played/Random)
Auto-switch to available server when active server is deleted

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_4.andro.message: Added Material Kolor dynamic theming based on album art
Added track action menu (more options button)

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_4.apple.message: HTTP-based LAN discovery service for server auto-detection

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_4.harmo.message: Enhanced fullscreen player with inline lyrics toggle and theme color extraction
Added background playback support with AVSession media session
Added image pre-caching system and storage management

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_4.deskt.message: Refactored proxy connection test to be asynchronous
Cache failed image loads to avoid repeated requests to failed cover URLs
Added browser Media Session API integration

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_4.web.s.message: Implemented source queue management for playback control

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_5.andro.message: Player bar now supports lyrics display
Lyrics view supports keeping screen on
Artist list supports grid/list toggle, role filtering and pull-to-refresh
Artist detail page now shows all songs
Playback queue panel supports removing and moving items

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_5.apple.message: Added Genre list and detail browsing
Added Plex server support with OAuth authentication
macOS is now a first-class deploy target with sandbox and signing

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_5.harmo.message: Player bar supports lyrics display with toggle
Lyrics view supports keeping screen on
Added Genre browsing with contextual navigation
Daily recommendation shuffle play linked with discovery page cards

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_5.deskt.message: Player bar now supports lyrics display
Lyrics view supports keeping screen on
Added startup loading screen and startup diagnostics
Added Plex media server support with OAuth authentication
Playback queue panel redesigned as drawer

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_7.commo.message: Added full music library folder browsing feature
Player bar lyrics toggle replaced with three-state mode (Off/Mini/Fullscreen)

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_7.andro.message: Added stream caching while listening, supports offline playback
Added online audio quality settings with per-network quality and transcode format selection
Integrated Android 12+ SplashScreen API for improved startup experience
Improved settings page functionality and user experience

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_7.apple.message: Added stream caching while listening, supports offline playback
Added animated gradient background launch screen
Refactored player expand/collapse animation with iOS 18+ Zoom transition support

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_7.harmo.message: Added stream caching while listening, supports offline playback
Added online audio quality settings with per-network quality and transcode format selection
Added branded splash screen with start window profile

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_7.deskt.message: Added stream caching while listening with proxy server and settings integration
Progress bar now supports click-to-seek with configurable interaction mode
Player bar adds more actions menu supporting add-to-playlist and page navigation

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_8.commo.message: Added auto-play on startup (disabled by default, toggle in Settings)
Daily recommendations now support per-library scope configuration
Added "Recently Added" semantic filter to library browsing
Playback records are now reported to the server in real-time (scrobble)
Support reading embedded lyrics from tracks, with automatic cleanup of server noise prefixes
Stream caching is now disabled by default, can be re-enabled in Settings

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_8.andro.message: Playback engine refactored from VLC to Media3 ExoPlayer + FFmpeg decoding
Playback preparation now shows source queue fetching progress
Global bottom content padding to prevent mini player from obstructing list content
Offline list redesigned with cover + row layout, supports sequential/shuffle playback
Stream cache background completion, auto-aggregated into offline content
Genre entry is automatically hidden when multiple libraries are configured
Track list supports jumping to currently playing song, with spectrum play indicator
Tablet Home page and player adapted for wide-screen layout

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_8.apple.message: Playback engine refactored from VLCKit to Apple Native Playback + FFmpeg decoding
Added source queue fetching progress display
Stream cache enhanced with tail pre-fetch and offline list integration
Fullscreen player adds playlist picker and navigation menu
Plex authentication flow UI redesigned with unified brand visual
System playlists now display localized names and are non-editable
Track list supports jumping to currently playing song

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_8.harmo.message: Added source queue fetching progress display
Auto-play on startup supports countdown prompt UI
Genre entry is automatically hidden when multiple libraries are configured
Plex OAuth authorization flow UI redesigned, unified across three clients

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_8.deskt.message: Playback engine refactored from VLC to MPV
Auto-play on startup supports countdown prompt UI and settings toggle
SMTC media session bound to window, fixed playback state and cover art display
Download page shows stream-cached offline items, UI refactored
Added scroll-to-current-song button, SongRow highlights currently playing track
Fullscreen player automatically exits fullscreen on navigation
Server URL supports pasting full address for automatic splitting

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_8.apple.message: macOS player changed to overlay window with fixed sidebar width
macOS fullscreen player adds toolbar linkage and threshold transition animation
macOS player bar and mini player adapted with Liquid Glass effects

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_8.windo.message: Acrylic blur effect is now limited to Windows 11+

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_9.commo.message: Discover page can be set as the home page
Distinguish first-time server setup from daily management with clearer entry points
Improved playback position and queue restoration on cold start

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_9.andro.message: Notification bar displays current lyrics line
Plex OAuth polling adds timeout retry and page recovery
Server management accessible from avatar menu
Double-tap back on main screen exits to home screen
Media notification uses app icon and vector media buttons
Deep Sea Blue and Stream Green themes use full Material 3 color palettes
Daily recommendation header and track actions show real album covers
Improved performance for track switching and cover color extraction on Now Playing page

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_9.apple.message: InfoPlist localization for app name and permission descriptions
Player song info supports navigation to artist/album detail pages
Now Playing and notification bar display current lyrics line with offset settings
Local network permission pre-check for server discovery
Fixed lyrics sync for non-continuous index in player bar and notification
Fixed interactive dismiss for fullscreen player zoom transition

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_9.harmo.message: Notification bar lyrics display and lyrics settings page
Cold start resume playback with queue position restoration
Localized app name, displays as 音流 in Chinese
Manual lyrics scroll only previews highlight, auto-follow resumes after delay
Switching server/library resets playback context and refreshes related UI

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_9.deskt.message: System media controls display current lyrics line
Added seamless playback toggle for smoother track transitions
Optimized welcome page layout for narrow screens
Unified card styling for server-related pages

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_9.apple.message: macOS player interaction enhancements and playlist picker refactor
macOS 13+ declares support for secure window state restoration

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_9.web.c.message: Compact layout for narrow screens with sidebar drawer

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_10.comm.message: Support lyrics search and manual override save
Tracks now support displaying multiple artists, tap to navigate to artist detail
Album list supports sorting by recent release
Introduced membership system (rolling out across platforms)

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_10.andr.message: Consume multi-artist data and support artist navigation
Album list supports sorting by added time and release time
Improved membership features and settings page
Improved server management UI components and error hints

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_10.appl.message: Player and various pages support multi-artist display and navigation
Refactored server endpoint config page with macOS adaptation

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_10.harm.message: Album list page adds recent release sorting
Introduced EndpointRoutingCoordinator for network-aware endpoint routing
Background audio task improvements, Widget snapshot sync and UI interaction optimizations
Fullscreen player subtitle layout and color adjustments

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_10.desk.message: Endpoint health UI, network monitoring and route rebinding
Support artist navigation and enhanced playback queue metadata sync

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_10.web..message: Lyrics search and user lyrics persistence
Endpoint health probing and runtime route rebinding

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_11.comm.message: Added endpoint health detection with automatic failover when the network changes
More reliable listening history reporting with accurate progress sync on track changes and pause
Fixed Navidrome artist detail track list display
Navidrome library and filtering features now enabled based on server version
Added desktop lyrics overlay with independent window, customizable style (position, opacity, font, color, stroke), and lock

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_11.andr.message: Added independent volume control on the player screen with persistence
Fixed progress reset when switching shuffle/loop modes
Reduced duplicate lyric requests when switching tracks
Snackbar dynamically avoids system navigation bar; nicer route-switching hints
Clear connection pool on network changes to fix server connection failures
Upgraded paginated list component; more screens now use paging
Improved immersive lyrics interaction and custom volume slider
Sleep timer now managed by the core engine for more accurate countdown
Clearer error messages when Plex sign-in fails
Automatically return to the main screen after server setup
Fixed playback queue not syncing after toggling shuffle mode

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_11.appl.message: Shortened transition animations for the player bar and full-screen player
Improved mini-player expand gesture to avoid accidental track skips on slight horizontal swipes
Fixed cover stuck in mid-state during incomplete upward swipe, which hid cover in player bar
Fixed touch-through on blank areas of the mini player
No longer shows route-switching hint when only one endpoint exists
Fixed timeline sync when decoding audio backend resumes playback
Added Siri Shortcuts for quick playback and favorite controls
Fixed Subsonic downloads failing or returning 0 KB files
Fixed blank cards appearing in Settings

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_11.harm.message: Full-screen player supports volume control with persistence
No longer shows route-switching hint when only one endpoint exists
Audio quality labels in route config page and fixed refresh waiting experience
Artist detail track list now loads paginated
Keep current queue item stable after queue reconciliation
Immersive lyrics driven by signal-based user interaction detection
Full-screen player layout and spacing improvements; background audio task and widget sync
Album, artist, and more lists now load paginated for smoother browsing

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_11.desk.message: Fixed desktop startup flow and first-screen experience
Support artist detail validation for compilation and multi-artist tracks
Fixed playback control and scrobble notification issues
Endpoint health UI and network monitoring improvements
Downloads page split into focused components with better UX
More accurate favorite state sync in all-libraries view
Improved membership error messages and device identification

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_11.web..message: Fixed browser local storage isolation between data stores
Fixed occasional playback state and UI display desync
More accurate favorite actions in all-libraries view

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_12.comm.message: Player background switching: solid, blur, and dynamic modes
Server-side playlist sorting and pagination; removed local drag-to-sort
Plex Home managed users and PIN login: add managed-user servers via PIN
Added runtime performance monitoring panel in Developer settings
Client logs can be reported to Fast Ship for easier troubleshooting
Switching playback modes keeps playback continuous without progress bar jumps
Fixed Emby playlist queries incorrectly injecting library scope limits
Original-quality audio is no longer silently transcoded to MP3 on Unknown network quality
Improved Subsonic compatibility, including qm-music library format support

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_12.andr.message: Landscape player: new landscape layout with lyrics aligned to portrait mode
Dynamic background: AMLL MeshGradient-style animated background
Server menu: moved server list into a Switch Server submenu in the avatar menu
Background keep-alive: player cover survives track changes; background resume no longer rebuilds the main screen
Fixed state jitter after playback completes at the end of the queue
Fixed bottom mini player overlapping list content
Fixed dynamic background flashing from dark to bright on every open
Large play/pause button now uses a hollow cutout style
Track changes no longer interrupt playback with 401 errors when stream cache is enabled

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_12.appl.message: Landscape player: full-screen player supports landscape orientation
Dynamic background upgrade: ColorfulX with palette extracted from cover art
Navigation refactor: iPhone uses a root single stack; tab bar only on Home
Loop playback hint: shows a toast when loop mode is enabled
Fixed mini bar not clickable and controls not restoring after collapsing immersive lyrics
Fixed detail page bottom obscured by the mini player bar
Fixed duplicate right arrows on shared playlist rows
Mini window mode for listening while doing other tasks
Main window geometry memory: restores position and size on next launch
New Apple TV client: browse your library, play music, and restore membership

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_12.harm.message: Landscape player: full-screen player supports landscape orientation
Playlist sorting: server-side sort with options in a submenu
Full-screen player refactor: unified sheet, landscape layout, animations, and lyrics scrolling
Fixed unresponsive playback mode switching and playback interruption
Fixed multiple issues reported in Beta.11 feedback
Full-screen player uses framework transitions to avoid animation jumps

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_12.desk.message: Main window geometry memory: restores position and size
Desktop lyrics: added Windows desktop lyrics entry and related improvements
Taskbar Thumb Bar buttons now show hover tooltips
Fixed lost playback session when changing tracks with stream cache enabled
Fixed auto-play on resume and progress bar seek jitter
Full-screen player ignores player-bar lyrics mode to avoid layout conflicts

download.release.beta.2_0_1_beta_12.web..message: Fixed lost playback session when changing tracks with stream cache enabled
Fixed auto-play on resume and progress bar seek jitter
